title: Tusk Act 4 (JCraft Addon)
description: Adds Tusk Act 4 as a stand to JCraft: EOE 0.18.0+ (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
**Adds Tusk Act 4 as a new stand to JCraft 0.18.0+**

**USE "/stand about"!**

This adds an entire new stand to JCraft with custom abilities! He doesn't replace ANY stands and he is an addition to your JCraft!

**This REQUIRES JCraft Additions 1.0.0 or above!**

This Stand does not have a lore accurate obtaining or evolution; Tusk Act 4 is just drawn at random on use of a stand arrow. 

Tusk Act 4 was built as a slow, but powerful stand. Though being a short-range stand, he does however feature 2 ranged attacks. The player is able to shoot their nails at the enemy during any attack, locking onto the nearest mob to it. Tusk Act 4 itself also has a charge attack that travels several blocks.

I know people have been begging for Tusk Act 4 in JCraft for a long time so I figured this addon would be nice shared for everybody who wants it. 

**I DID NOT MAKE THIS MODEL!** Mr. Garlic, the official model maker for JCraft, gave me this model since they are working on a new Tusk Act 4 model that will eventually be added to JCraft. This addon is more to just have something FOR NOW....

If you have questions about this mod, MESSAGE ME! The JCraft Devs did not make this mod so they will not be able to help you.

and hopefully for the Steel Block Run server ;)
